generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier references and type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid helper declarations within existing AGREE clauses.
When encountering type errors, ensure helper declarations align with expression types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only AADL features visible to the current scope or helper declarations within the same annex.
Valid AGREE scalar types are `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing new architecture elements as a repair; focus on fixing existing contract logic.
Do not attempt to resolve references with package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
